summary: The paper establishes that the minimal density constant $\widehat{\rho}$ satisfies $\frac{13}{18} \leq \widehat{\rho} \leq \frac{10}{11}$, with the lower bound witnessed by a spectrally symmetric orientation of $K_6 - E(2K_2)$ and the upper bound coming from a density obstruction for line graphs of dense graphs. No follow-up paper resolving the exact value of $\widehat{\rho}$ was found in the literature as of May 2026; the problem remains open.

notes: No follow-up found in the indexed literature. The conjecture is approximately 5 months old (posted December 2025). Four web searches and one WebFetch on the source paper abstract were performed; all returned only the original arXiv:2512.08049 entry, confirming the open status with high confidence.
